name: Flash of Genius
description: When you or a creature you can see within 30 feet of you fails an ability check or a saving throw, you can take a Reaction to add a bonus to the roll, potentially causing it to succeed. The bonus equals your Intelligence modifier (minimum of +1). You can take this Reaction a number of times equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum of once). You regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

mechanics.trigger: you, or a creature you can see within 30 feet, fails an ability check or a saving throw
mechanics.effect: Add a bonus to the roll equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum +1)
